description_long: A cluster of five bananas is joined together at the brown stem, each banana displaying a smooth, slightly curved form typical of the Cavendish variety. The peels are a uniform pale yellow with a few small brown spots and minor blemishes, indicating natural surface wear. The bananas are closely packed, with their tips fanning outward and their bodies overlapping, creating a compact bunch. The surface texture appears matte with a gentle sheen, and the peels show no significant tears or splits. The stem is thick and robust, colored a deeper brown at the top where the bananas connect. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on any of the bananas.
description: A bunch of five pale yellow bananas joined at a brown stem, with smooth, slightly curved peels and minor blemishes.
description_view_0: The leftmost view shows the bananas overlapping, with the outermost banana displaying a few brown spots and the stem clearly visible at the top.
description_view_1: This view presents the bananas fanned out, with all five tips visible and the peels appearing smooth and unblemished.
description_view_2: The rightmost bananas are more prominent, with the curvature of the bunch and the compact arrangement of the bananas clearly visible.
description_view_3: The bananas are seen from a slightly lower angle, emphasizing the rounded tips and the smooth, continuous surface of the peels.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels are intact with a smooth surface, showing only minor blemishes and a few small brown spots. There are no visible tears, splits, or signs of peeling.
